name: name-atlas
description: Plan, apply, verify, and reconstruct connected-folder changes with Name Atlas.

interface.shortDescription: Plan once. Apply the same verified folder change elsewhere.
interface.longDescription: Plan one bounded connected-folder reorganization with GPT-5.6, or apply a verified Name Atlas Change File without another model call. Every operation uses the same local job, receipt, verifier, and reconstruction services as the Name Atlas browser and CLI.
defaultPrompt: Organize a project folder with Name Atlas.
Apply a shared Name Atlas Change File.
Verify a Name Atlas result and recreate its source.
